name: Mikazukinoyaiba, the Moon Fang Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>月</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>牙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>が</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－クレセント・ドラゴン
desc: During the End Phase, if this card is in your hand or GY: You can Special Summon it, but place it on the bottom of the Deck when it leaves the field. You can discard 1 card; add 1 Level 7 DARK Dragon monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Mikazukinoyaiba, the Moon Fang Dragon" once per turn.
mnst_eff: During the End Phase, if this card is in your hand or GY: You can Special Summon it, but place it on the bottom of the Deck when it leaves the field. You can discard 1 card; add 1 Level 7 DARK Dragon monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Mikazukinoyaiba, the Moon Fang Dragon" once per turn.
eff: During the End Phase, if this card is in your hand or GY: You can Special Summon it, but place it on the bottom of the Deck when it leaves the field. You can discard 1 card; add 1 Level 7 DARK Dragon monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Mikazukinoyaiba, the Moon Fang Dragon" once per turn.

action: Places itself on the bottom of the Deck when it leaves the field
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
